name: Rich Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Make a pastry as directed and fit into a 9-inch pie pan, creating a high fluted edge; do not bake the crust.
3. Cream butter and sugar until light.
4. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
5. Sprinkle flour and blend until smooth.
6. Mix in remaining ingredients and spoon into pastry shell.
7. Bake for 45 minutes until browned and springy to the touch.
8. Cool on wire rack and serve at room temperature.
